variants.title: Filtrec WT1232 Special Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WT1232. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WT1232 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 34.9 mm, Inner Diameter: 15.8 mm, Length: 70.0 mm
